prompt: Review the staged changes. This is a Node.js task management service.

assertions.text: Review identifies the N+1 query problem in getTasksWithAssignees
Review flags missing await on db.query or fetch calls in updateTaskStatus
Review identifies the XSS vulnerability in buildTaskReport
Review notes that deleteCompletedTasks lacks a transaction
Review provides actionable fix recommendations with complete code examples
Review categorizes issues using Critical/Important/Suggestions framework
Review quotes the problematic code inline before showing the fix
